zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Strange於大約1237年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯沃迪時，她的父親John le Strange III44歲，母親Lucy de Tregoz37歲。她於1280年與Robert Corbet在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Strange于大约1237年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾斯沃迪时，她的父亲John le Strange III44岁，母亲Lucy de Tregoz37岁。她于1280年与Robert Corbet在英国英格兰史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Strange
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Gloucestershire): nickname for a newcomer to a district, from Middle English strange ‘foreign’ (Old French estrange, Latin extraneus, from extra ‘outside’).

Irish (Antrim): this name is also common in Ireland, where, in addition to its English etymology, it may represent an Anglicized form of any of several Irish names containing the element gall ‘stranger’, e.g. Doyle , Gallagher .

variants.name: Stranger
meanings: English: nickname for a newcomer to an area, from Middle English stra(u)nger(e) ‘stranger, foreigner’ (Old French estrangier). Compare Strange .

variants.name: Doyle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Sean, Kieran, Seamus, Aileen, Dermot, Liam, Niall, Brennan, Brigid, Conal, Conan, Donal.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhghaill ‘descendant of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was used as a byname for Scandinavians, in particular to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDougall , McDowell .

variants.name: Lestrange
meanings: Irish and English: variant of Strange 1 with fused Old French definite article le.

Irish: in Ireland, adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche ‘son of Cúchoigcriche’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the borderland’. Lestrange was adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche probably due to the presence of a prominent family of Lestrange, of similar meaning, who settled in the counties of Westmeath and Offaly in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Strange was born about 1237, in Cheswardine, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John le Strange III, was 44 and her mother, Lucy de Tregoz, was 37. She married Robert Corbet in 1280, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Robert Corbet en 1280, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Strange è nata il circa 1237 nel Cheswardine, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John le Strange III, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Lucy de Tregoz, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Robert Corbet nel 1280, nel Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Strangeが約1237年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアチェスワーディンで生まれた時，父John le Strange IIIは44歳，母Lucy de Tregozは37歳であった。1280年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットでRobert Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Strange(이)가 대략 1237년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 체스워딘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John le Strange III(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy de Tregoz(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 Robert Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Strange nasceu aproximadamente 1237, em Cheswardine, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John le Strange III, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Lucy de Tregoz, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Corbet em 1280, em Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Strange родилась около 1237 г. в местности чесвардаин, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John le Strange III было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Tregoz, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Corbet в 1280 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.
